title: RememberResponse
description: Response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag remember` on stdout as a single JSON line. backend_invoked added in v1.0.84 by ADR-0042.

memory_id.description: Row ID of the persisted or merged memory.

action.description: Whether the memory was newly created, updated via --force-merge, or merged into an existing one.

operation.description: Semantic alias of `action` for protocol compatibility.

version.description: Version number after the write (starts at 1).

chunks_created.description: Total number of chunks the body was split into BEFORE dedup. Equals 1 for single-chunk bodies even though no row is written to memory_chunks (the memories row itself acts as the chunk).

chunks_persisted.description: Number of rows actually written to the memory_chunks/memory_chunks_vec tables. Equals 0 for single-chunk bodies (the memory row is the chunk) and equals chunks_created for multi-chunk bodies. Use this to disambiguate from chunks_created when reasoning about row counts.

merged_into_memory_id.description: Present when action=merged; the target memory_id.

relationships_truncated.description: True when relationships were capped at the per-memory limit.

urls_persisted.description: Number of URLs extracted and persisted.

extraction_method.description: Automatic extraction method used: url-regex or none:extraction-failed (since v1.0.79; the values gliner-<variant>+regex and regex-only are historical, <= v1.0.75). Null when extraction was not requested or entities were provided externally.

name_was_normalized.description: True when the provided name was auto-normalized to kebab-case.

original_name.description: Original name before kebab-case normalization. Present only when name_was_normalized is true.

backend_invoked.description: v1.0.84 (ADR-0042): backend LLM that ran the live embedding (claude, codex, or none). Omitted when no backend was invoked (e.g. dry-run or LLM-free path).
